evalAfter: (async()=>({ver:(await (await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now())).json()).version, title:document.title, mermasViewOk: typeof MermasView!=='undefined' && typeof MermasView.lbNav==='function' && typeof MermasView.lbCerrar==='function', aspectoTabs: !!document.getElementById('tabMermasNRes') && !!document.getElementById('tabMermasNDes'), kpiSublabel: (document.querySelectorAll('.kpi-sublabel')[3]||{}).textContent}))()
